name: pv installation calculation service
description: This calculation service calculates the active power produced by a PV installation based upon the weather.

relevant_links.name: PVInstallation
relevant_links.description: Details on the PVInstallation esdl type

calculations.name: predict solar power
calculations.description: Send the potential active power produced by the pv installation depending on the input from the weather service.

inputs.name: solar_irradiance
inputs.description: The expected solar irradiance for the coming 12 hours as predicted by the weather service.

outputs.name: potential_active_power
outputs.description: The potential active power produced by the PV installation for the coming 12 hours based upon the weather.

calculations.name: current pv power production
calculations.description: Send current power production of the pv installation

inputs.name: current_solar_irradiance
inputs.description: The actual pv power production for the coming fifteen minutes

outputs.name: pv_active_power
outputs.description: The amount of active power produced by the pv installation at this moment.
